name: Open Policy Agent
allowed_use_boundary: Use policy decisions as external evidence only.
Do not inherit authority from an allow result.
claims: OPA evaluates structured input against policy and produces policy decisions.
non_claims: OPA does not prove transition admissibility.
OPA does not grant execution authority.

transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external policy engine; authority not inherited
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source and mapping reconstruct the bounded relationship
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: policy evidence may inform standing review
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, mapping, or authority overclaim
